name: flux2_klein_edit
description: Flux 2 Klein 9B multi-reference image editing pipeline. Edit images using text prompts with two reference images for style/content transfer via ReferenceLatent conditioning. 8 euler steps, cfg 5. Uses CFGGuider (2 model passes per step) for dual positive/negative conditioning — roughly 2x slower per step than the text-to-image template which uses BasicGuider. This is the official BFL approach; switching to BasicGuider+FluxGuidance would halve per-step cost but drops the negative conditioning path from the ReferenceLatent chain.

prompt.description: Text instruction describing the edit (e.g., 'Change the background to a forest' or 'Apply the logo to the steering wheel')

image.description: Primary reference image to edit. Provides the content/layout to modify.

reference_image.description: Second reference image for style/material/branding transfer (e.g., a logo or texture to apply).
